A type of '''cruiser''' was used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="SW:RC" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:geocrus1.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A ship of this class over [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].]]
These cruisers also bore a slight resemblance to an elongated [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] from the opposing forces of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] and the [[Providence-class Dreadnought|''Providence''-class Dreadnought]] utilized by [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist forces]]. Little is known about the class itself, except that it was capable of operating inside an [[atmosphere]] and that it was armed with at least two dual [[turbolaser]] cannons.<ref name="SW:RC" />

==History==
Ships of this class were present at the battles of [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] and [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="SW:RC" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:CISShipGeonosis-RC.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A ship of this class over [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].]]
This class of ship first appeared in ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' during missions on Geonosis and Kashyyyk. It is also briefly seen in ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' in the versions developed for PS3/PC, Xbox 360, and Wii. It appears in the [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]] level. After defeating a [[Junk Titan|Junkyard Titan]], [[Galen Marek|Starkiller]] uses his [[The Force|Force]] abilities to create a bridge out of one such ship, lodged in the piles of scrap that cover the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Oddly, the cruiser seen is significantly smaller than it would seem in other games.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]''
